feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: What are some truly great games? Things that you'd be able to to quantify as "hi…
entry.content: What are some truly great games? Things that you'd be able to to quantify as "high art"? I've been trying to find a game that deals with hope, despair, humanity, etc. The best thing that I can think of that does this is Berserk, although not a videogame. But what I think really elevates a game is how it uses it's own medium to tell a story. Something like Dark Souls comes to mind. What games should I play? Maybe NieR would fit this?
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /b/ Random: Earlier today I asked about lifting a 100kg object using a rope tied to a beam. …
entry.content: Earlier today I asked about lifting a 100kg object using a rope tied to a beam. So I got a 20kg sack of cement attached to it and the beam started to make cracking sounds. I have no fucking alternative now. I don't know what to tie the rope around now
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /g/ Technology: What are the odds of my laptop battery exploding on my lap and blasting my dick off?
entry.content: I have a 2020 MacBook Air, and it's starting to feel like it's on its last legs—lots of crashes, bad battery life, overheating and the CPU or fan or whatever just screaming. I should probably just get a new one before it completely dies, but until then, do I need to worry at all about safety? I'm rather attached to my penis, and would hate to lose it.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >I can envision a future where everybody has an AI super-computer in their house…
entry.content: >I can envision a future where everybody has an AI super-computer in their house, like you have a home theater in your house, you have a stereo system in you house Yes I agree with the AI super-computer in the house thing, but I think a price over 2000$ would be a bit too steep. I would totaly have a AI super-computer in my house if it was under 3 digits though.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /mu/ Music: What is the best way to learn to play piano? My goal is to be able to improvise …
entry.content: What is the best way to learn to play piano? My goal is to be able to improvise jazzy and bluesy songs. I'm not interested in playing classic music like Bach or Chopin (even though I enjoy listening to them being performed). Maybe my question is too general and I'm sorry for that.
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Thoughts on fact we can't figure out how to optimize 0,1 sequences to have littl…
entry.content: Thoughts on fact we can't figure out how to optimize 0,1 sequences to have little noise at scales above n=30 https://arxiv.org/pdf/1512.02475 this is reason why lag exists at all cause no one has optimized this problem. If we're able to do so lag as we know it would be non existent outside of hardware
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: The Light in the Darkness
entry.content: I'm making this thread because Brazilian Theodore keeps making more and more threads and, in a broader sense, there are a lot of depressed guys on this board. I agree that life is cruel for the most part. I'm a man on the autism spectrum. Life as an autistic man is hard because most people think that all autistic men are rapists who deserve a lifetime of torture. That is "the darkness". Life is still worth living because there are a few good things in life that make the cruelty bearable. That is
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: why gamers no longer care for replayability?
entry.content: It is a pattern I have noticed when it comes to popular games and even games discussed here. Western first world gamers seem to no longer care about replayability, why is that? For example, I am a white south american, where I come from we really want our games to be replayable. We want to extract the maximum value out of the money we spend. Maybe that economical situation is why western first world gamers no longer care about videogames being games, but experiences, you pay $20 minimum and get
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: why is this game considered a classic by many now?
entry.content: Even at the time it was considered to be fine but nothing more.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /b/ Random: >be me >11 or smth, in elementary school >socially retarded >new girl joins clas…
entry.content: >be me >11 or smth, in elementary school >socially retarded >new girl joins class >pretty pretty >pass her a note in class like 'lets be friends' and shit >she reads it, smiles and nods >never even talk to her >a week after that pass her another note reading 'didnt rly work out last time, lets try again' >she looks at me like i just started shitting kittens >never even talk to her >reflect on this event for eight years after why
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Anyone using kvm switches? I got two computers and want to use the same monitor …
entry.content: Anyone using kvm switches? I got two computers and want to use the same monitor and keyboard/mouse for both. Got a kvm switch and everything is 4k120hz compatible, but only the usb works properly. The monitor only works for the main pc.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Attrition was the perfect game mode for a shooter >AI mobs meant even when someo…
entry.content: Attrition was the perfect game mode for a shooter >AI mobs meant even when someone wasn't good at PVP he could still contribute >combined with titans it meant each match had lots of variables going on >game has naturally fast and fluid movement why wasn't it ripped off? And why TF2 died anyway? It was a great game
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Echo and the Bunnymen new LP
entry.content: After a messy tour - Ian often picking fights with the audience, refusing to sing the choruses, and walking offstage mid-set, in the midst of a decade long slow moving band breakup that has left their only other original member, guitarist Will feeling "ostracized" from the creative process and puffing about it in interviews... then one day, for no reason at all, ECHO & THE BUNNYMEN RETURNED... with a cool song actually https://youtu.be/gCDFLUBYxVg?si=r6o jeOz3NhgnPOLd
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Any time I see an IG post with a car problem, I always comment "Glad I don't hav…
entry.content: Any time I see an IG post with a car problem, I always comment "Glad I don't have to deal with this on my Tesla. " For example, someone's Prius had their cat stolen. "Glad I don't have to deal with this on my Tesla. It doesn't have a cat." Or another one where their car rolled away cause they left it in neutral, and it ran them over when trying to save it. "Glad I don't have to deal with this on my Tesla. It auto parks whenever the driver door opens."
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.content: >Trash Panda Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: WHY is Odyssey being shilled SO HARD?
entry.content: BECAUSE next week Spiderman opens. The Odyssey has pretty much One Week to earn as much as it can. The studio is in Full Panic Mode. There is no licensing for The Odyssey. No toys or action figures. No cereal or Kraft Macaroni & Cheese tie ins. This week is it's primary revenue stream. Blu Ray sales a few months from now are not going to save them. The studio is desperate.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /g/ Technology: /aaa/ anti-ai alliance
entry.content: It has begun edition Resources >we don't use AI in our design or production https://mass-driver.com/article/fro m-human-hands >Speculative Growth and the AI "Bubble" [pdf] https://economics.mit.edu/sites/def ault/files/2026-07/speculative_grow th_AI_public.pdf >Generative AI Is an Engineering Disaster https://www.theatlantic.com/technol ogy/2026/07/generative-ai-engineeri ng-disaster/687901/ >WSJ: The AI Backlash Has Tech Executives Fearing for Their Lives https://www.wsj.com/us-news/the-ai- bac
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Why is there so much FUD against EVs?
entry.content: I don't think EVs are perfect but in every thread, there's so much FUD against EVs, I feel like I want to adress all in one go. >EVs are a car as service This isn't inherent to EVs. An EV can be just as simple as a normal ICE car, if not even more. Besides, modern ICE cars are also loaded with electronics and optional subscriptions. This is clearly an industry-wide trend and not inherent to a particular driveline. >EVs cause pollution through electricity Even in countries with dirty electricity
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto
